title: cymbopogon schoenanthus var. densiflorus
intro: Cymbopogon schoenanthus var. densiflorus, also known as East Indian lemongrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of East Indian lemongrass include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating pain. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
